message:
feat(e2e): add opcode and subsystem profile packs to hot-path inline bundles

Introduce HotPathOpcodeProfilePack and HotPathSubsystemProfilePack
structs that capture per-run opcode hit counts and subsystem-level
latency breakdowns with full provenance metadata (bead_id, run_id,
trace_id, scenario_id, fixture_id, workload, seed, scale, concurrency,
replay_command). Wire build_hot_path_opcode_profile() and
build_hot_path_subsystem_profile() into the inline bundle serializer
so hot-path reports include structured machine-readable profile data
alongside the existing actionable ranking and summary markdown.

Add schema version constants HOT_PATH_OPCODE_PROFILE_SCHEMA_V1 and
HOT_PATH_SUBSYSTEM_PROFILE_SCHEMA_V1. Update inline bundle test to
verify both new sections appear with correct schema versions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
